status_seeker.reason: Low reactance tolerates moderate frequency. Status confirmation benefits from repetition.

easy_decider.reason: Low information search means they decide fast. Beyond 2/day adds no value.

careful_truster.reason: Active evaluation mode — higher frequency tolerated. They WANT information. Most valuable segment for frequency.

skeptical_analyst.reason: High reactance (z=+1.02). More than 1/day triggers active resistance.

cross_track.rule: If a user matches multiple tracks, use the HIGHEST-converting track creative. Deduplicate across tracks — max 4/day total.

reactance_recovery.rule: If CTR drops below 0.05% after 5+ impressions for any user, suppress 72 hours.
